answer: OpenClaw adoption is accelerating among agent builders. Composio released a native OpenClaw plugin. Nebius Token Factory added Kimi K2 and DeepSeek models for serverless deploy.

hits.title: Composio OpenClaw plugin ships MCP tool router
hits.content: Composio's OpenClaw plugin connects agents to 250+ apps via MCP. OAuth handled. Tools include GitHub, Slack, Linear, Gmail.

hits.title: Nebius Token Factory — Kimi K2 on serverless
hits.content: OpenAI-compatible API for inference. Deploy OpenClaw to Nebius Serverless in one command.

hits.title: Tavily Agent Toolkit for research agents
hits.content: search_and_answer, search_dedup, crawl_and_summarize primitives for LLM agents.

hits.title: BuilderShip hackathon — 40 builders on a yacht
hits.content: OpenClaw hackathon hosted by Composio, Nebius, Tavily. Submit by June 12.
